violations.description: CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Cases of crackers and jugs of sauces being stored near mop sink.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Observed a portable fan with its guards containing heavy debris build up.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Various shelf edges throughout kitchen area are not properly sealed.
POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of cheese and meats prepped the day before was noted not being properly dated for disposition.

FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Cloth noted being used as a food contact surface inappropriately in areas subject to moisture. Prep top cooler has moisture build up on the bottom of the cooler wiping cloths are being used to absorb the moisture but are left in the cooler. Cloth being used in the bread warming drawer but is not removed after each day of service.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling in the food prep area noted in need of cleaning. HVAC vents and ceiling coverings has debris build up above food prep areas.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Equipment exteriors noted not clean. Warming shelves near char broiler is observed with debris build up on heating element guard.
